reviews.review_msg: Worst professor i have ever seen in Columbia college. I will not recommend this professor to weak students those who are not able to meet his expectations. Very strict professor, exams level are very high. He does partiality with students who are backbenchers or are shy to speak in class. Worst professor ever ,don't know how to deal with students
Very strict and expect a lot from students even knowing that students have very busy schedule want them to participate too much and even expects from weak students and very partial professor
I will recommend everyone to go for this professor. You just need to attend his  lectures and give attention in class. He is pass you with a very good grade.
so strict and very bad at grading

He is nice and amazing prof. I would recommend everyone to go for him. Yeah, achieving a higher grade is easy. You just need to attend his classes and participation also matters a lot. All his quizes and exams are within his lectures and notes. You just need to go through a topic and lectures he taught in class. He is just Superb. No words for him.
If you like sociology then you must take this professor. He is very knowledgeable and he is always ready to help students.

He is literally the BEST prof at sfu in sociology department. Everything that he taught in his class I still remember most of the concepts and its been about a year now. I still look back at notes that I took from his lectures to recall concepts for other SA courses. I would love to take a class with him again!! His lectures are amazing.
I JUST WANT TO SAY... WHAT ARE YOU WAITING FOR?????? JUST TAKE HIS CLASS!!!!!!!!!!!!
